home.title: Tracked trips
home.removeBody: This will stop tracking this trip and remove it from the list. Price history will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

search.title: Search trains
search.description: Find trains by date and route, then track a specific departure.

results.noResults: No search results. Go back to search and try again.
results.noTrains: No trains found for this search.
results.possibleTrain: Possible train – not yet published for this date
results.intervalPrompt: We will check the price at this interval.

tripDetail.noPriceChangesUnpublished: No price changes yet. Trip not yet published.
tripDetail.removeBody: This will stop tracking this trip and remove it from the list. Price history will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Configure where to send alerts when a trip price changes.
notifications.emailMissingConfig: Email is configured but SMTP credentials are missing. Set SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USERNAME and SMTP_PASSWORD in your environment to enable email alerts.
notifications.haMissingConfig: Home Assistant is configured but connection details are missing. Set HA_URL and HA_TOKEN in your environment to enable HA alerts.
notifications.browserSubtitle: Web notifications while the app is open
notifications.telegramMissingConfig: Telegram is configured but connection details are missing. Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in your environment to enable Telegram alerts.
notifications.removeBody: This will stop this notification from being used for future price-change alerts.

notificationCreate.title: Add notification
notificationCreate.description: Choose the channel, configure it, and save. Multiple notification types can be enabled at the same time.
notificationCreate.labelPlaceholder: e.g. My email / Phone / This browser
notificationCreate.emailNotConfiguredAfter: in your environment (e.g. docker-compose.yml) before alerts can be sent.
notificationCreate.emailSmtpNote: SMTP connection details (host, port, credentials) are set via environment variables in your deployment, not stored here.
notificationCreate.subject: Subject
notificationCreate.haNote: Home Assistant URL and long-lived token are set via environment variables in your deployment, not stored here.
notificationCreate.notifyServiceHelp: The backend will call notify.<service> on your Home Assistant instance.
notificationCreate.telegramNote: Telegram bot token and chat ID are set via environment variables in your deployment, not stored here.
notificationCreate.browserDescription: When this app is open, it will poll for price changes and show a browser notification.
notificationCreate.savedBrowserGranted: Browser notifications enabled (app must be open)
notificationCreate.errorHaServiceRequired: Home Assistant notify service name is required.
notificationCreate.errorBrowserNotSupported: Browser notifications are not supported in this browser.

emailNotif.headingDown: Price dropped for your tracked trip
emailNotif.headingUp: Price increased for your tracked trip
emailNotif.headingChanged: Price changed for your tracked trip
